TIKTOK⚡QUEUE
0
ADD
QUEUE
SETTINGS
PASTE LINKS
HOW IT WORKS
1
Find a TikTok → Share → Copy Link → paste it above
2
Tap Add to Queue — add as many as you want
3
Tap Sync to ScriptBuilder — pushes to GitHub
4
Open ScriptBuilder on your computer → TikTok tab → Load from Phone → Transcribe & Rewrite
No links yet.
Go to Add tab and paste some TikTok URLs.
✓ GitHub connected
